children.heading: In general
children.label: a In general
children.text: There are authorized to be appropriated to the Secretary $93,000,000 for the period of fiscal years 2025 through 2026 to carry out this subchapter and section 302 of the Fisheries Survey Vessel Authorization Act of 2000 (title III of ; ; note).Public Law 106–450114 Stat. 194533 U.S.C. 891b

children.heading: Limitation on fleet modernization activities
children.label: b Limitation on fleet modernization activities
children.text: All NOAA fleet modernization, shipbuilding, and conversion shall be conducted in accordance with this subchapter.
